food.description: A citrus fruit commonly eaten fresh or as juice.
food.mechanism: Grapefruit inhibits CYP3A4 enzyme activity, reducing the body's ability to break down certain medications. The furanocoumarins present in grapefruit irreversibly bind to gut-wall CYP3A4 enzymes, dramatically decreasing first-pass metabolism of substrate drugs.
risks: Up to 15× increase in statin plasma concentration

medication.description: A lipid-lowering medication used to control cholesterol.
medication.mechanism: The SLCO1B1 gene variant decreases the transport of statins into the liver, leading to higher blood levels. This variant encodes for the OATP1B1 transporter; the 'C' allele results in significantly reduced transport capacity.
